title: Companies seed Reddit to shape what AI repeats - TCR 06/05/26
description:
Companies seeded Reddit's r/biohackers with promotional posts engineered for ChatGPT and Google AI Search to scrape as neutral knowledge, Walmart built an in-house AI coding agent called Code Puppy to route work across multiple models while Uber capped engineers at $1,500 monthly per tool, and a Nature Medicine trial restored arm strength to seven chronic stroke patients with a 32% average gain through cervical spinal cord stimulation.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-june-5-2026/

0:00 Walmart builds Code Puppy as Uber caps coding spend
1:24 Companies seed Reddit to game AI answers
4:32 Control the Dependency
7:53 Cervical stimulation reopens arm function after stroke
11:09 Battery storage advances at lab and grid
14:20 Altermagnetism confirmed as a new magnetic phase
16:08 Close

This episode covers the answer-engine manipulation campaign on Reddit, Walmart's Code Puppy and Uber's coding-tool spending cap, cervical spinal cord stimulation reopening arm function years after stroke, North Carolina co-op battery microgrids alongside anode-free sodium pouch cells, deep learning revealing the hidden two-state structure of liquid water, and the confirmation of altermagnetism in three Physical Review Letters papers.

The spine of the edition is the contest over AI's substrate. Peptide and hormone sellers learned to plant posts inside the exact text ChatGPT and Google AI Search read as trusted human experience, and the r/biohackers moderators closing the category is the first antibody of a source-trust defense forming. Walmart answered the same lock-in pressure from the other direction, building an abstraction layer that keeps multiple frontier models interchangeable, while Uber rationed the spend it could not trace to shipped features. Underneath the governance noise, capability kept decentralizing and barriers kept falling: arm function restored years after a stroke with almost no rehab, community-owned co-ops rewriting grid resilience as a colder sodium chemistry points past lithium, and a learning system resolving a question about liquid water that resisted a generation of analysis.

Additional Reading:

- Canary Media: Why North Carolina's Electric Co-ops Are Turning to Grid Batteries: https://www.canarymedia.com/articles/batteries/north-carolina-electric-co-ops-grid-batteries
